<!-- indicator: fig-poison-control-cannabis -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-poison-control-cannabis
#| fig-cap: 'Poison Center Cannabis Calls, Rate per 100,000 Population, 2020–2024'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Poison Center Cannabis Calls, Rate per 100,000 Population, 2020–2024.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-poison-control-cannabis", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
